Experience the full dose of Mega Mania and groove to the beats of Meesaala Pilla! ūüí•ūüé∂

snippet.title: Dhurandhar 2 Teaser REVIEW | Deeksha Sharma
snippet.description:
Dhurandhar 2 Teaser Review By Deeksha Sharma. Dhurandhar The Revenge Featuring Ranveer Singh vs Akshaye Khanna vs Arjun Rampal Directed by Aditya Dhar will break all the box office records in March 2026 as the Biggest Hindi Film Sequel will clash with Toxic Yash Pan World Cinema. Dhurandhar 2 Movie Teaser is the same as Dhurandhar Post Credit but will set new Social Media records with Dhurandhar 2 Trailer. Dhurandhar 2 Full Movie Reaction & Teaser Trailer Expectations would be shared in this Video. 

#Dhurandhar2 #Dhurandhar2Teaser #Dhurandhar2Movie

snippet.title: Am‚ÄĘbeng Pante || Official Music Video || Saldorik S Dio feat Janggisa ||
snippet.description:
Written & Composed by Saldorik S Dio

Ia git-o Am‚ÄĘbeng Pante Salgro me‚ÄĘtrako jorana basegenchimoba ku‚ÄĘbipektangko ku‚ÄĘgalgija ripingna kang‚ÄĘkare kaaniko miksonga aro me‚ÄĘtrana am‚ÄĘbeng jolni nitoaniko aro namgipa dakbewalrangkoba parake aganaha.

Cast- James Libang & Sita Samnam
Modern Cultural Dance- Do‚ÄĘkaku Art & Cultural Association, Tura (D.A.C.A)
Wangala- Nokatgre Youth Cultural Club

Credit Roles:-   
Music- Kangkan Rabha (Pitch cave studio, Assam)
Mixed & Mastered- Trihangku Lahkar (Mumbai)
Mix Assistant- Bidyut Jyoti Mohan (Mumbai), Bitupon Boruah (Mumbai)
Vocal Recorded- Daryl's Audio Lab (Tura)

Vocal- Saldorik S Dio & Janggisa
Guitar- Kangkan Rabha
Bassist- Sydney A'gitok
Percussionist- Zill Marak
Sarenda/Serja- Hayensa 
Flutist- Debraj Rabha
Gongmina- Danny Oliver
Chigring- Kamea Ch Marak, Jimchi M Marak

D.O.P- Jaksram K Marak ( www.jkmvisuals.in )

Script & Direction- Saldorik S Dio
Production Assistants-Advanson Marak, Chisak D Sangma, Danny Oliver, Gamchu Marak, Chegriksal N Sangma, Molly Chambugong
Producer- Jonok S Sangma
Sponsored- Dr. Conrad K Sangma (Hon‚Äôble Chief Minister of Meghalaya)

Special thanks:-

snippet.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2 | Official Trailer
snippet.description:
Everybody wants this. 

Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt, and Stanley Tucci return in The Devil Wears Prada 2, in theaters May 1. Watch the full trailer now. 

Almost 20 years after making their iconic turn as Miranda, Andy, Emily and Nigel‚ÄĒMeryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt and Stanley Tucci return to the fashionable streets of New York City and the sleek offices of Runway Magazine in the eagerly awaited sequel to the 2006 phenomenon that defined a generation. 
 
The film reunites the original main cast with director David Frankel and writer Aline Brosh McKenna, and introduces an all-new runway of characters including Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak and Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms and Tibor Feldman also reprise their roles as ‚ÄúLily‚ÄĚ and ‚ÄúIrv‚ÄĚ from the first film. 
 
‚ÄúThe Devil Wears Prada 2‚ÄĚ is produced by Wendy Finerman, and executive produced by Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt and Aline Brosh McKenna. The film debuts exclusively in theaters May 1.

id.title: The Devil Wears Prada 2 | Trailer Resmi
id.description:
Semua orang menginginkan ini.

Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt, dan Stanley Tucci kembali dalam The Devil Wears Prada 2, tayang di bioskop 1 Mei. Saksikan trailer lengkapnya sekarang.

Hampir 20 tahun setelah memerankan Miranda, Andy, Emily, dan Nigel‚ÄĒMeryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt, dan Stanley Tucci kembali ke jalanan kota New York yang modis dan kantor-kantor mewah Majalah Runway dalam sekuel yang sangat dinantikan dari fenomena tahun 2006 yang mendefinisikan satu generasi.

Film ini menyatukan kembali para pemeran utama asli dengan sutradara David Frankel dan penulis Aline Brosh McKenna, dan memperkenalkan deretan karakter baru termasuk Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak, dan Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms dan Tibor Feldman juga kembali memerankan peran mereka sebagai ‚ÄúLily‚ÄĚ dan ‚ÄúIrv‚ÄĚ dari film pertama.

‚ÄúThe Devil Wears Prada 2‚ÄĚ diproduseri oleh Wendy Finerman, dan diproduseri eksekutif oleh Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt, dan Aline Brosh McKenna. Film ini tayang perdana secara eksklusif di bioskop pada 1 Mei.

de-DE.description:

Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt und Stanley Tucci kehren in ‚ÄěDer Teufel tr√§gt Prada 2‚Äú zur√ľck ‚Äď ab 1. Mai im Kino. Jetzt den kompletten Trailer ansehen.

Fast 20 Jahre nach ihrem legend√§ren Auftritt als Miranda, Andy, Emily und Nigel kehren Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt und Stanley Tucci in die modischen Stra√üen von New York City und die eleganten B√ľros des Runway Magazine zur√ľck ‚Äď in der mit Spannung erwarteten Fortsetzung des Ph√§nomens von 2006, das eine ganze Generation pr√§gte.

Der Film vereint die Originalbesetzung mit Regisseur David Frankel und Drehbuchautorin Aline Brosh McKenna und pr√§sentiert eine komplett neue Riege an Charakteren, darunter Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak und Conrad Ricamora. Tracie Thoms und Tibor Feldman kehren in ihren Rollen als ‚ÄěLily‚Äú und ‚ÄěIrv‚Äú aus dem ersten Film zur√ľck.

‚ÄěDer Teufel tr√§gt Prada 2‚Äú wurde von Wendy Finerman produziert, die ausf√ľhrende Produktion √ľbernahmen Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt und Aline Brosh McKenna. Der Film startet am 1. Mai exklusiv in den Kinos.

it.title: Il diavolo veste Prada 2 | Trailer ufficiale
it.description:
Tutti lo vogliono.

Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt e Stanley Tucci tornano ne Il diavolo veste Prada 2, nelle sale dal 1¬į maggio. Guarda subito il trailer completo.

Quasi 20 anni dopo la loro iconica interpretazione di Miranda, Andy, Emily e Nigel, Meryl Streep, Anne Hathaway, Emily Blunt e Stanley Tucci tornano nelle strade alla moda di New York e negli eleganti uffici di Runway Magazine nell'attesissimo sequel del fenomeno del 2006 che ha definito una generazione.

Il film riunisce il cast principale originale con il regista David Frankel e la sceneggiatrice Aline Brosh McKenna, e introduce una passerella di personaggi completamente nuova, tra cui Kenneth Branagh, Simone Ashley, Justin Theroux, Lucy Liu, Patrick Brammall, Caleb Hearon, Helen J. Shen, Pauline Chalamet, B.J. Novak e Conrad Ricamora. Anche Tracie Thoms e Tibor Feldman riprendono i ruoli di "Lily" e "Irv" del primo film.

"Il diavolo veste Prada 2" √® prodotto da Wendy Finerman e i produttori esecutivi sono Michael Bederman, Karen Rosenfelt e Aline Brosh McKenna. Il film debutter√† in esclusiva nelle sale il 1¬į maggio.

snippet.description:
Nothing here can be trusted‚ÄĒnot the memories, not the silence, not even your own thoughts. This psychological horror thriller creeps under your skin, blurring reality until fear feels unavoidable.

HONEY THE MOVIE scheduled for worldwide theatrical release on February 6 2026. 

Credits:
Written & Directed by: KARUNA KUMAR
Producer: RAVI PEETLA
DOP:  NAGESH BANNEL
Music: AJAY ARASADA

Trailer Edit: PRANEETH KUMAR
Production Managers: RAVI POTLURI & PINNI NARAYANA
Marketing By: Young Mantra

snippet.title: Aashaan - Official Trailer | Johnpaul George | Indrans | Joemon Jyothir.ASHN TRAILER 4K
snippet.description:
Aashaan is an upcoming dramedy film written and directed by Johnpaul George, produced
under the banner of Guppy Cinemas in association with Wayfarer Films releasing in theaters on
5th February 2026.
Cast: INDRANS, JOEMON JYOTHIR, SHOBI THILAKAN, BIBIN PERUMBILLI, ABIN BINO,
MADAN GOWRI amoung others.
Movie Credits:
Banner: Guppy Cinemas
Music Director, Writer & Director: Johnpaul George
Producers: Johnpaul George, Annam Johnpaul, Suraj Philip Jacob
DOP: Vimal Jose Thachil
Editor: Kiran Das

Background Score: Ajeesh Anto
Production Designer: Vivek Kalathil
Makeup: Ronex Xavior

VFX Supervisor: Thoufeek Hussain
Co Director: Renjith Gopalan

Abhijith Ajith, Chethan J Lal, Vaishnav Kannan TR, Jinu Ben

snippet.title: IZZATWADI | NICK L X @sambata__00  | OFFICIAL MUSIC AUDIO | Namaste Album 2026
snippet.description:
Nick L presents the Official Audio Version of IZZATWADI, is a raw, old-school gangster rap track from the upcoming album NAMASTE (2026), straight from the streets of Pune. Built on dark Arabic samples blended with sitar and trumpets, the track carries a heavy, gritty sound rooted in desi hip-hop culture.

Nick L opens the track with sharp Marathi bars, speaking on his skills, lifestyle, and Pune‚Äôs hip-hop mindset‚ÄĒstreet-born, fearless, and unapologetic. Sambata enters with a ruthless ‚Äúragel‚ÄĚ verse, packed with authority, industry references, and no-filter energy.

‚ÄúIzzatwadi‚ÄĚ is more than a song‚ÄĒit‚Äôs a statement on respect, survival, and position in the game. A pure underground DHH experience. Do watch, like, share & leave your valuable comments.

Subscribe Now ‚Äď https://www.youtube.com/@nick-l

snippet.title: VARANASI - Trailer | Mahesh Babu | S.S. Rajamouli | Prithviraj | Priyanka Chopra | John | FanMade AI
snippet.description:
VARANASI ‚Äď Trailer presents a mythic and action-packed vision set between the Himalayas and the divine.

This fan made AI trailer imagines Mahesh Babu in an intense battle across the frozen Himalayas, where legend meets destruction. Armed with a trishul and carrying the fierce aura of Bholenath, he faces monstrous animals, a ruthless human army, and roaring lions that symbolize raw power and divinity. Every fight feels larger than life, blending mythology, spirituality, and brutal action.

Inspired by the epic storytelling style of S.S. Rajamouli, this concept trailer expands into a grand cinematic world featuring Prithviraj, Priyanka Chopra, and John, adding layers of conflict, strength, and scale. The visuals are raw and divine, with snow-covered mountains, thunderous combat, and a hero standing between humanity and chaos.

This video is created purely for entertainment and creative imagination using AI tools. It is not an official trailer and has no connection to any real film production.

If you love mythological action, powerful heroes, and cinematic fan made AI trailers, like, share, and subscribe for more epic concepts.

---

snippet.title: My Wife's First Ever FC Mobile Pack Opening! Her Luck is Insane
snippet.description:
I let my wife open FC Mobile packs for the first time ever, and her luck was absolutely unbelievable! But there's a twist...

In this video, we played a "Guess The Player" challenge. For every 10 packs she opens, I have to guess the player based on her clues (Flag, Position, or OVR). If I get 40 out of 50 correct, I have to buy her a ¬£5,000 Dior Saddle Bag! ūüĎúūüíł

The stakes were high, but the packs were even higher. She managed to pull some of the rarest cards in the game, including 117 Ruud Gullit, 117 Lionel Messi, and 117 Virgil Van Dijk! Did I guess enough players correctly to win her the bag? Or did I fail the challenge? Watch to find out!

ūüĒ• VIDEO HIGHLIGHTS:

The Challenge: Guess 40/50 Players correctly!
The Reward: A ¬£5,000 Dior Saddle Bag ūüĎú
Wife's Luck: Packing 117 Gullit, 117 Messi, 117 Van Dijk! ‚ö°
The Final Pack: Did I guess it right? (High Stakes!)

Mithe Tere Bol Pari 
Na Patya Tole Pari

Bnya Mahol Pari 

Mithe Tere Bol Pari 
Na Patya Tole Pari 
jaan Mhari Kadhe Se

1.
Sakal Teri Ya Bholi se re Tyor Tera tedha

Mithe Tere Bol Pari 
Na Patya tole pari
Jaan mhari kadhe se 
Teri Ramjhol Pari 

2.
Hawaa tanne fiki kardi kardi tanne ora Ki 
Are nigaah Tere pe gad ri se gaad ri se chhorya Ki 
Mukesh Jaji Khogya 
Yo Beej Bighan Ke bogya 
Minna bhi Bola Hogya 
Na kre Makhol Pari 

Mithe Tere Bol Pari 
Na Patya Tole pari 
Jaan mhari Kadhe se 
Teri Ramjhol Pari

snippet.title: Dhanda Nyoliwala - Deadly Zone (Official Music Video) | Deepesh Goyal | VYRL Haryanvi
snippet.description:
Deadly Zone Official Music Video shows Dhanda Nyoliwala exactly where he belongs ‚ÄĒ in his element, owning every frame.

Listen to Deadly Zone:
YouTube Music - https://music.youtube.com/watch?v=mg8tm2qO-JA&si=F0VpnazuyPMh-kFu
Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/track/68LtGqZ3Ulvy1nMcdhEEht?si=fdc3a154cd474bef
Apple Music - https://music.apple.com/us/song/deadly-zone/1872355445


#DeadlyZone #Kohram #DhandaNyoliwala 

Singer/Lyrics/Composer: Dhanda Nyoliwala
Music: Anyvibe
Mix & Master: Romoez

Director: Deepesh Goyal
DOP: Vikcee
Asst.: Ashish Khomera, Ankit Thapa,
Khyati Sharma
Editor/DI: Bharat Mittal/Deepesh Goyal
Operator: Rupi
EP: Raja 
Production: Alina Russia
Project by: Sumit Bamal

Music release inquiries: contact.vyrlregional@umusic.com

Lyrics:

Indo Aryan Haryanvi Dna
Sida Sida Bolu To Ha Warrior
Konse Country Me Bhejna Tambakhu
Mene Jagha Bata Ibe Kra Courier
Are Race Laani Battiya Pe Gadi Laale Sehar Ke
Bana Dena Fast And Furious
Are Life Drive Phele Din Te Chore Ki R Chal Ri Hai Jma He Notorious
Jit Bi Java Kehar Sa Dhava Banke Cyclone Chori
Dur Hi Reh Ke Kare Gi Jaan Ke Deadly Hai Pura Zone Chori
R Mene Suna Kai Lele Sore Aaj Kal Seradon Chori
Dur Hi Reh Ke Kare Gi Jaan Ke Deadly Hai Pura Zone Chori
 
24 Ghante Busy Rhva Mint Ki Bi Vel Nhi
Sara Sara Din Rave Bajta Mobile Ni
Paa Sake Kudte Me Dil Ke Me Mel Ni
Rahu Haryane Mere Yaar Hai Majhal Ni
Bodara Te Paar Vafadaar Hai Kai Yaar
Kde Kudni Ni Padi Koi Diwaar Hai
Chote Mote Role Nahi Mitra N Gole
Aava Chhut Ke Thana Te Bharo Bhar Hai
Are Tapan Ni Di Date Tika Hoya Time Ho Ya
Kara Hoya Kise Te Karaar Hai
Tere Pure Gaam Gel Mitra Ka Rola
Ek Teri Gela Pura Pura Pyaar Hai
Samne Aaja Bol Na Paate Hojave Hai Mon Chori
Dur Hi Reh Ke Kare Gi Jaan Ke Deadly Hai Pura Zone Chori
R Mene Suna Kai Lele Chore Aaj Kal Seradon Chori
Dur Hi Reh Ke Kare Gi Jaan Ke Deadly Hai Pura Zone Chori
 
R Parso Fly Kra India Te Uk Birmingham Me Chal Ri Trail Ni
Shade Kaale Laaye Versace Aali Chori
Hoodie Lv Pe Chidka Chanel Ni
Haryane Me Puch Tu Jaake Nyoliwala Kon Chori
 
Dur Hi Reh Ke Kare Gi Jaan Ke Deadly Hai Pura Zone Chori
R Mene Suna Kai Lele Chore Aaj Kal Seradon Chori
Dur Hi Reh Ke Kare Gi Jaan Ke Deadly Hai Pura Zone Chori


Follow & Subscribe to VYRL Haryanvi:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/vyrlharyanvi/  
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/vyrlharyanvi/  
Sharechat: https://sharechat.com/profile/vyrlharyanvi?d=n  
YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCViPmftRQIxoaVmlAfPTgdQ

ŗįą ŗį™ŗįĶŗįŅŗį§ŗĪćŗįįŗįģŗĪąŗį® ŗį¨ŗĪĀŗįßŗįĶŗįĺŗįįŗįā ŗį®ŗįĺŗį°ŗĪĀ ŗįÖŗį§ŗĪćŗįĮŗįāŗį§ ŗį∂ŗįēŗĪćŗį§ŗįŅŗįĶŗįāŗį§ŗįģŗĪąŗį® "ŗį∂ŗĪćŗįįŗĪÄ ŗįĶŗįŅŗįėŗĪćŗį®ŗĪáŗį∂ŗĪćŗįĶŗįį ŗį¶ŗįāŗį°ŗįēŗįā" (Vighneswara Dandakam) ŗį≤ŗĪąŗįĶŗĪć ŗį≤ŗĪč ŗįĶŗįŅŗį®ŗįāŗį°ŗįŅ. ŗįą ŗį¶ŗįāŗį°ŗįēŗįā ŗįĶŗįŅŗįāŗįüŗĪá ŗį¨ŗĪĀŗį¶ŗĪćŗįßŗįŅ, ŗįúŗĪćŗįěŗįĺŗį®ŗįā ŗįēŗį≤ŗįóŗį°ŗįāŗį§ŗĪč ŗį™ŗįĺŗįüŗĪĀ, ŗįģŗį®ŗįā ŗį§ŗį≤ŗį™ŗĪÜŗįüŗĪćŗįüŗįŅŗį® ŗį™ŗį®ŗĪĀŗį≤ŗĪćŗį≤ŗĪč ŗįĶŗįŅŗįėŗĪćŗį®ŗįĺŗį≤ŗĪĀ (ŗįÜŗįüŗįāŗįēŗįĺŗį≤ŗĪĀ) ŗį§ŗĪäŗį≤ŗįóŗįŅŗį™ŗĪčŗį§ŗįĺŗįĮŗįŅ.

ŗįą ŗį≤ŗĪąŗįĶŗĪć ŗįöŗĪāŗįłŗĪćŗį§ŗĪā ŗįģŗĪÄŗįįŗĪĀ ŗįöŗĪáŗįłŗĪá ŗįíŗįēŗĪćŗįē LIKE, ŗįÜ ŗįóŗį£ŗį™ŗįĮŗĪćŗįĮ ŗį™ŗįĺŗį¶ŗįĺŗį≤ ŗįöŗĪÜŗįāŗį§ ŗį≠ŗįēŗĪćŗį§ŗįŅŗį§ŗĪč ŗįłŗįģŗįįŗĪćŗį™ŗįŅŗįāŗįöŗĪá ŗįíŗįē "ŗįóŗįįŗįŅŗįē (Sacred Grass)" ūüĆŅ ŗį§ŗĪč ŗįłŗįģŗįĺŗį®ŗįā. ŗįÖŗįāŗį¶ŗįįŗįŅŗįēŗĪÄ ŗį∂ŗĪĀŗį≠ŗįā ŗįēŗį≤ŗįóŗįĺŗį≤ŗį®ŗįŅ ŗįēŗĪčŗįįŗĪĀŗįēŗĪĀŗįāŗįüŗĪā ŗį≤ŗĪąŗįēŗĪć ŗįöŗĪáŗįĮŗįāŗį°ŗįŅ.

ūüôŹ Special Prayer: ŗįģŗĪÄ ŗįēŗĪčŗįįŗįŅŗįēŗį≤ŗĪĀ ŗį®ŗĪÜŗįįŗįĶŗĪáŗįįŗįĺŗį≤ŗį®ŗįŅ ŗįēŗĪčŗįįŗĪĀŗįēŗĪĀŗį®ŗĪáŗįĶŗįĺŗįįŗĪĀ ŗįēŗįĺŗįģŗĪÜŗįāŗįüŗĪć ŗį¨ŗįĺŗįēŗĪćŗįłŗĪć ŗį≤ŗĪč "Om Gam Ganapataye Namaha" ŗįÖŗį®ŗįŅ ŗįĶŗĪćŗįįŗįĺŗįĮŗįāŗį°ŗįŅ ŗį≤ŗĪáŗį¶ŗįĺ ŗįłŗĪćŗįĶŗįĺŗįģŗįŅŗįēŗįŅ ŗįáŗį∑ŗĪćŗįüŗįģŗĪąŗį® ūüźė (Elephant) ŗįéŗįģŗĪčŗįúŗĪÄŗį®ŗįŅ ŗįēŗįĺŗįģŗĪÜŗįāŗįüŗĪć ŗįöŗĪáŗįĮŗįāŗį°ŗįŅ.

Song Details: Song: Sri Vighneswara Dandakam Deity: Lord Ganesha (Vinayaka) Day: Wednesday Special (Budhavaram) Benefit: Removing Obstacles (Vighna Nivaram)

Tags: #VighneswaraDandakam #GaneshaSongsTelugu #WednesdaySpecial #BudhavaramPatalu #OmGamGanapatayeNamaha #VinayakaDandakam #RemoveObstacles #TeluguBhaktiLive #GanapathiSongs #BhaktiTV

snippet.title: FUNKY - Rattatataav Lyrical | Vishwak Sen, Kayadu Lohar | Anudeep | Ram Miriyala | Bheems Ceciroleo
snippet.description:
Watch Rattatataav Lyrical Video from Movie Funky on Aditya Music.

ūüéß Song CreditsūüéôÔłŹ

Song Name: Rattatataav
Lyrics: Dev Pawar
Singer: Ram Miriyala
Music Director: Bheems Ceciroleo 

ūüéĶ Musicians CreditsūüéĶ

Song Composed And Arranged by Bheems Ceciroleo 
Keyboards & Rhythms- Agastya Raag
Vocals Recorded & Tuned by Sreerag Suresh@SKR Studios Kochi
Vocal Supervision- Ritesh G Rao
Recording Studio @ A Bheems Musicals (Hyderabad) 
Sound Engineer - Mastan Vali
Song Pre-Mixed by Mastan Vali
Song Mixed & Mastered by Akash Shravan(Chennai)
Music Production Manager- Malya Kandukuri
Music Incharge - KD Vincent (Kochi) 

Movie Details:-

Movie: FUNKY
Cast: Vishwak Sen, Kayadu Lohar, Naresh, VTV Ganesh, and others.
Director: Anudeep KV 
Producer: Naga Vamsi S - Sai Soujanya
Music: Bheems Ceciroleo
Editor: Navin Nooli
Cinematography: Suresh Sarangam
Written by: Anudeep KV & Mohan Sato
Art Director: Jonny Shaik 
Executive Producer: Nandipati Murali
Co Director : P Hari Shankar Nath
Line Producer: Ch. Rama Krishna Reddy
DI - Deccan Dreams
Colourist: A Arun Kumar
Presenter: Srikara Studios
Banners: Sithara Entertainments & Fortune Four Cinemas
Audio on: Aditya Music 


Pallavi
‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶

Oppesukunta pilla 
Thappu antha naadhenantu Rattatataav
Thappinchukonu pilla Sorry neeku cheppukuntu
Rattatataav

Arare kukka pilla laaga thippukoke pilla
Pootakokka saari maata maarchamaake illa
Thappukone thappukonu thittinaavo malla
nuvvu nannu okkasaari nammaraadhe

Rattatataav pilla Rattatataav
Neeku dhandamettukunta pilla Rattatataav
Rattatataav pilla Rattatataav
Neeku gullu kattukunta pilla Rattatataav

Charanam 1
‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶.

Nene chesaanente thappu
Evaru cheyaru cheppu
Paapaale chesinattu
Praanaale theesinattu
Choosaavo nee meedhottu

Dheshamedho Paadainattu
Kaaranam nene ayinattu
Aapaave Paanipattu
Endhuke jallikattu
Vidichipettave bettu

Bat tho heartne gunji kottoddhe
Cutegaa unnavani nuv ginjukovaddhe


Rattatataav pilla Rattatataav
Neeku dhandamettukunta pilla Rattatataav
Rattatataav pilla Rattatataav
Neeku gullu kattukunta pilla Rattatataav


Charanam 2
‚Ä¶‚Ä¶‚Ä¶..

Bad luck ye friend ayipaaye
Happiness ye end ayipaaye
Dark room lo sad song lu vintu rojulu paaye

King laaga bathikevaanni
Bongulaaga bendayyaane
Yemi raa balaraju
Endhuku ee poju
Baagaledhee roju

Naa life tho aadake thokkudu billaata
Nammavaa inkeppudoo nuv ne cheppina maata

Rattatataav pilla Rattatataav
Neeku dhandamettukunta pilla Rattatataav
Rattatataav pilla Rattatataav
Neeku gullu kattukunta pilla Rattatataav
